name: VoxCPM
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        OpenBMB /

      VoxCPM  

    
      VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
summary: VoxCPM是一个支持多语言语音生成、创意声音设计和逼真语音克隆的无标记文本转语音(TTS)项目，其创新性的免分词技术使语音合成更加灵活高效。

name: production-agentic-rag-course
summary: 该项目是一个专注于生产环境中代理式检索增强生成（RAG）的课程，通过Python实现，帮助开发者高效构建和优化RAG系统。它值得关注是因为结合了实际应用场景与前沿技术，为AI代理开发提供了实用指南。

name: Open-LLM-VTuber
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Open-LLM-VTuber /

      Open-LLM-VTuber  

    
      Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms
summary: Open-LLM-VTuber是一个支持跨平台本地运行的开源项目，通过免提语音交互和Live2D虚拟形象实现与任意大语言模型的自然对话，并具备语音打断功能，为AI交互提供沉浸式体验。

name: machine-learning-for-trading
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        stefan-jansen /

      machine-learning-for-trading  

    
      Code for Machine Learning for Algorithmic Trading, 2nd edition.
summary: 该项目提供了《算法交易的机器学习（第二版）》的配套代码，展示了如何将机器学习技术应用于量化交易策略开发，值得关注因其结合了前沿的金融分析与实战代码示例。

name: chopratejas
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        chopratejas /

      headroom  

    
      Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
summary: 该项目是一个用于压缩工具输出、日志、文件和RAG块的Python工具，能在保持答案不变的情况下减少60-95%的token使用量，值得关注因其显著提升LLM处理效率并降低成本。

name: D4Vinci
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        D4Vinci /

      Scrapling  

    
      🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!
summary: "Scrapling 是一个自适应网络爬虫框架，能处理从单次请求到大规模爬取的所有需求，其灵活性和扩展性值得关注。"

name: supermemory
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        supermemoryai /

      supermemory  

    
      Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.
summary: Supermemory 是一个极速、可扩展的记忆引擎和应用，为 AI 时代提供记忆 API。

name: markitdown
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        microsoft /

      markitdown  

    
      Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
summary: Microsoft的markitdown是一个Python工具，用于将文件和办公文档转换为Markdown格式，值得关注因为它简化了文档格式转换流程。
